themeName: Sea of Stories: A BookTok & Bookstagram Reading Voyage

visual.aestheticLabel: Sea of Stories â Understated Coastal Library at Sea

typographyDirection.headlineStyle: Editorial serif for headlines that feels like a timeless dustâjacket; brand UI type remains primary for navigation and CTAs
typographyDirection.bodyStyle: Clean, modern sans for readability on mobile; default to brand body type; if unavailable, use a neutral sans

visual.imageryMood: Hushed Aegean modernism: linen and paper textures, teak and glass, open horizon, the quiet pleasure of a page with the ship and sea doing most of the talking.
visual.lightingStyle: Soft coastal daylight with gentle bounce, golden hour warmth on teak, blueâhour interiors with candlelike pools of light; no hard flash, no event lighting.
visual.compositionNotes: Cruiseâfirst frames: horizon lines, railings, portholes, and window seats. One or two guests max, relaxed posture, negative space, ocean beyond. A single subtle cue (a linen tote strap, a paper edge, a cardigan) rather than busy tabletops. Keep signage and dense stacks out of frame. Let breeze, fabric, and glass reflections carry mood.
avoidList: Group circles or crowded communal tables
Big stacks of books as a motif
Lanyards, name badges, or table tents as focal elements
Ring lights, boom mics, or obvious production gear
Overt Rooftop Garden visuals not present on Celebrity Infinity
referenceMoodboard: Linen swatches in ecru and bone
Teak deck against deep blue sea
Porthole geometry and long window seats
Martini Bar glass and steel reflections
Whitewashed hillsides and blue domes as distant coastline
Aegean chart lines as subtle graphic texture

plausibilityFramework.governingPrinciple: Let the ship, sea, and easy vacation rhythm lead; the bookish layer appears only as guestâcarried cues, soft naming, or light conversational energy that could vanish and the image would still read as a great cruise moment.
cruiseNativeMoments: Windowâseat daydreaming in a forward lounge with open water ahead
Sunrise on a quiet deck with naturally spaced chaises and blankets
Goldenâhour stroll by the rail before dinner
A slow espresso or spritz at the Martini Bar with live soft jazz nearby
Aftâdeck dusk while sailing away from a Greek island
Private balcony downtime on a sea day
nicheEnhancedMoments: A single paperback or eâreader resting on a lap by the window
A linen tote strap and a slim bookmark peeking from a pocket
Two guests angled toward each other at a small table, trading a oneâline recommendation over nightcaps
Menu or cocktail card with a discreet literaryânamed nod
A small, lowâprofile leaveâone/takeâone shelf appearing organically in a highâtraffic lounge, no signage, just a few spines
Soft jazz drifting from a nearby loungeânatural ambiance, never a takeover
implausibleLiteralizations: Author panels in the theater with microphones and stage lighting
Masterclassâstyle instruction, syllabi, or graded analysis
Mandatory preâcruise reading lists or quizzes
Signâup tables, whiteboards, or posted schedules dominating a space
Chairs roped off or reserved en masse for readers
Large banners declaring BookSwap or BookTok zones
allowedProps: Linen or canvas tote with a small bookish mark
Espresso cup or sparkling water with lemon
Small enamel pin with a tasteful book icon
discouragedProps: Lecterns, microphones, PA speakers, or projectors
Poster boards, pullâup banners, or stepâandârepeat backdrops
Rolling carts of books or oversized stacks
Ring lights, tripods, or camera rigs
Whiteboards, markers, or classroom desk layouts

messaging.elevatorPitch: Sea of Stories is a BookTok and Bookstagramâfriendly reading vacation that stays cruiseânative: long sea days, lounges with ocean views, and unhurried meals on Celebrity Infinityâs 10âNight Best of Greece & Turkey. The niche shows up as linenâandâpaper atmosphere, soft jazz in quieter corners, a discreet leaveâone/takeâone shelf, and the kind of railâside chats where a single line can sell a book. No schedules to chaseâjust great ports, great food, and pages that pair beautifully with the Aegean.
messaging.voicePersona: A considerate travel friend with an editorâs eyeâspecific, unhurried, lightly witty, and welcoming.

merch.conceptStatement: Sloganâled tees that blend maritime iconography with bookish charmâclean vector linework, quiet palette, cruiseânative humor, and printâfriendly simplicity.

audio.ambientNarrationScript: Mornings begin with sea and a sentence. On Celebrity Infinity, the Aegean moves past the glass as pages turn at their own unhurried pace. A linen layer, a quiet corner, a small recommendation shared before dinner. Greece and Turkey arrive like new chaptersâwhite villages on a ridge, markets glowing at duskâthen back to the ship, where the horizon holds your place. No rush, no rules. Just open water, open chapters.
audio.hypeClipScript: Read slow. Sail slower. Celebrity Infinity, Greece and Turkeyâsoft jazz, sea air, and the page youâve been saving. Open water, open chapters.
audio.voiceProfile: Warm, bookish, and unhurriedâgenderâneutral narrator with a calm midâlow register; light coastal lilt acceptable, never theatrical.
audio.musicMood: Soft jazz brushes and upright bass with airy Rhodes and nylon guitar; 70â85 BPM, coastal reverb; subtle Mediterranean color without becoming touristic.

tiktokOrganic.hook: No schedule. Just sea and a sentence.

narrative.title: Open water, open chapters â TikTok cut
narrative.scriptOrNarration: Mornings begin with sea and a sentence. On Celebrity Infinity, pages move at the pace of the Aegean. Two lines traded before dinner, then the horizon holds your place. No rushâjust open water, open chapters.
narrative.visualDirectionNotes: Cruise-first: begin on the shipâs wake through lounge glass, then a linen sleeve lifts softly in breeze. Cut to golden-hour rail: two guests lean shoulder-to-shoulder, shared glance; one murmurs a one-line rec (inaudible, subtitle only). Blue-hour interior with candlelike pools of light; no stacks, no signage. Single paperback appears briefly, never hero. Wardrobe cues: light cardigan, reading glasses tucked away. Rotate angles: porthole geometry, teak deck, ocean negative space.
narrative.backgroundDescription: Soft coastal daylight, golden-hour warmth on teak, blue-hour Martini Bar reflections; hush of ship and sea.
narrative.musicMood: Soft jazz brushes, upright bass, airy Rhodes, ~75 BPM with coastal reverb.

instagramReels.caption: Open water, open chapters. Celebrity Infinityâs 10âNight Best of Greece & Turkeyâunhurried mornings, horizon-led afternoons, and the kind of quick rec that finds you before dinner.

emailHeader.subjectLine: Open water, open chapters â Celebrity Infinity, Greece & Turkey
emailHeader.preheader: A calm, book-friendly cruise. Windows, water, and time to readâno rush.
emailHeader.bodyDirection: Keep copy unhurried and atmospheric: emphasize sea days, window seats, horizon-led calm, and occasional one-line recommendations between guests. Avoid any language that sounds scheduled or hosted.
emailHeader.visualDirection: Hero image: forward lounge window with open sea; secondary: golden-hour rail with two guests side-by-side. Palette leans deep navy and sea-glass; serif headline over ample negative space. No stacks or signage.

discordBanner.serverBannerDescription: Aegean calm, teak and glass, horizon-led reading mood aboard Celebrity Infinity. Windows and water first; the bookish layer stays subtle.
discordBanner.welcomeMessageDirection: Welcome aboard. Find a window, share a quiet rec, and let the horizon set the pace. Open water, open chapters.

heroExplainer.title: Sea of Stories â A reading-friendly voyage on Celebrity Infinity
heroExplainer.scriptOrNarration: Mornings begin with sea and a sentence. On Celebrity Infinity, the Aegean moves past the glass as pages turn at their own unhurried pace. A linen layer, a quiet corner, a small recommendation shared before dinner. Greece and Turkey arrive like new chaptersâwhite villages on a ridge, markets glowing at duskâthen back to the ship, where the horizon holds your place. No rush, no rules. Just open water, open chapters.
heroExplainer.visualDirectionNotes: Cruise-first montage: 1) Wide forward-lounge window, wake tracing the sea. 2) Linen sleeve, page turnsâbook never dominates frame. 3) Two guests by the rail at golden hourâposture cue and shared glance. 4) Martini Bar blue-hour reflections with soft jazz; no close-ups of menus. 5) Passing coastlineâwhitewashed hillside from a believable distance. 6) Balcony sunrise with espresso. Typography: editorial serif titles, neutral sans captions. Palette: deep navy, sea-glass, warm teak. No staged groups, no signage.
heroExplainer.backgroundDescription: Soft coastal daylight, golden-hour teak, candlelike blue-hour pools; ship ambience and sea hush.
heroExplainer.musicMood: Soft jazz brushes, upright bass, Rhodes and nylon guitar; 70â85 BPM with coastal reverb.
